text:
Created attachment 167793
check-nagios_smartmon.patch

As a maintainer of port I've some fixes to simplify ports files. I think there no need to bump portrevision.

This patch is tested with poudriere: https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2016-03-07_11h20m00s/logs/nagios-check_smartmon-20100318_2.log

portlint also is happy:
portlint net-mgmt/nagios-check_smartmon.new/
looks fine.
